query:
SELECT id, name, category, country, organization 
FROM grants 
WHERE name LIKE '~%' 
   OR name LIKE '%~%'
   OR name REGEXP '^[0-9~. ]+$'
   OR LENGTH(name) < 5
ORDER BY name
LIMIT 100;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user cK99zxEtGoTfC1g.7228e2c6a840 --database ne96tB4yURpkfMNLLJuy9T --execute SELECT id, name, category, country, organization
